properties.name: spring.application.base-url
properties.description: Base API URL to access this service

properties.name: spring.application.auth-domain
properties.description: Domain for authentication, authorization and CORS configuration

properties.name: jwt.public-key
properties.description: Public RSA(RS256) for JWT token verification, this key will be generated from private key of Auth service

properties.name: jwt.private-key
properties.description: Private RSA(RS256) for JWT token generation, this key will be generated from private key of Auth service
